blocks.text: Dear Ben, your death was a shock to us. We barely had time to mourn our friends who died in the cave, and then we immediately lost you. This murder is cruel and ruthless. Ben, you died from the hand of one of us. From now on, it's every man for himself. Anyone and everyone could be killed on a cold night, in the circle of former friends. There is no more trust, there is no hope, there is no more unity between us. Your death is the end. No one will get out of here alive.

Five to one, baby
One in five  
No one here gets out alive, now 
You get yours, baby  
I'll get mine  
Gonna make it, baby  
If we try
